mapper.sql: id, projectId, assetId, leakId, effectiveFrom, effectiveTo, disabled, createBy, createTime, updateBy, updateTime
mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into af_industry_asset_leak_relation (projectId, assetId, leakId, effectiveFrom, effectiveTo, disabled, createBy, createTime, updateBy, updateTime) values (#{projectId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{assetId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{leakId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{effectiveFrom,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{disabled,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into af_industry_asset_leak_relation
projectId,
assetId,
leakId,
effectiveFrom,
effectiveTo,
disabled,
createBy,
createTime,
updateBy,
updateTime,
#{projectId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{assetId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{leakId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{effectiveFrom,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{disabled,jdbcType=BIT},
#{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update af_industry_asset_leak_relation
projectId = #{projectId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
assetId = #{assetId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
leakId = #{leakId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
effectiveFrom = #{effectiveFrom,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
effectiveTo = #{effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
disabled = #{disabled,jdbcType=BIT},
createBy = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
createTime = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updateBy = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
updateTime = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update af_industry_asset_leak_relation set projectId = #{projectId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, assetId = #{assetId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, leakId = #{leakId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, effectiveFrom = #{effectiveFrom,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, effectiveTo = #{effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, disabled = #{disabled,jdbcType=BIT}, createBy = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, createTime = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updateBy = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updateTime = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

trim.if: (alr.effectiveTo is null or alr.effectiveTo >= #{effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) AND

if.if: (alr.effectiveTo is null or alr.effectiveTo >= #{model.effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) AND

trim.if: ( alr.createBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or alr.updateBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )

mapper.select:
select * from af_industry_asset_leak_relation as alr
alr.id = #{id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
alr.projectId = #{projectId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
alr.assetId = #{assetId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
alr.leakId = #{leakId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
alr.effectiveFrom <= #{effectiveFrom, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
(alr.effectiveTo is null or alr.effectiveTo >= #{effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) AND
alr.disabled = #{disabled, jdbcType=BIT} AND
alr.createBy = #{createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
alr.createTime = #{createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
alr.updateBy = #{updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
alr.updateTime = #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND

select count(1) from af_industry_asset_leak_relation as alr
alr.id = #{id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
alr.projectId = #{projectId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
alr.assetId = #{assetId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
alr.leakId = #{leakId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
alr.effectiveFrom <= #{effectiveFrom, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
(alr.effectiveTo is null or alr.effectiveTo >= #{effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) AND
alr.disabled = #{disabled, jdbcType=BIT} AND
alr.createBy = #{createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
alr.createTime = #{createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
alr.updateBy = #{updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
alr.updateTime = #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND

select * from af_industry_asset_leak_relation as alr
alr.id = #{model.id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
alr.projectId = #{model.projectId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
alr.assetId = #{model.assetId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
alr.leakId = #{model.leakId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
alr.effectiveFrom <= #{model.effectiveFrom, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
(alr.effectiveTo is null or alr.effectiveTo >= #{model.effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) AND
alr.disabled = #{model.disabled, jdbcType=BIT} AND
alr.createBy = #{model.createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
alr.createTime = #{model.createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
alr.updateBy = #{model.updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
alr.updateTime = #{model.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
( alr.createBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or alr.updateBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )

select count(1) from af_industry_asset_leak_relation as alr
alr.id = #{model.id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
alr.projectId = #{model.projectId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
alr.assetId = #{model.assetId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
alr.leakId = #{model.leakId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
alr.effectiveFrom <= #{model.effectiveFrom, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
(alr.effectiveTo is null or alr.effectiveTo >= #{model.effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) AND
alr.disabled = #{model.disabled, jdbcType=BIT} AND
alr.createBy = #{model.createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
alr.createTime = #{model.createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
alr.updateBy = #{model.updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
alr.updateTime = #{model.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
( alr.createBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or alr.updateBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )

select alr.id, l.id as leakId, JSON_SET(IFNULL(l.`customInfo`, "{}"), '$.statusName', bd.basicDataName, '$.trackStatusName', bd2.basicDataName ) as customInfo, l.*, ph.projectId, ia.id as assetId, ia.assetName, ph.projectName from `af_industry_asset_leak_relation` alr left join `af_industry_leak` l on alr.`leakId` = l.`id` and alr.`disabled` = false and l.`disabled` = false left join af_industry_asset as ia on ia.`id` = alr.`assetId` and alr.`disabled` = false and ia.`disabled` = false left join af_industry_asset_project_relation apr on apr.assetId = ia.id and ia.disabled = false left join `pm_project` ph on ph.`projectId` = apr.`projectId` and apr.`disabled` = false and IFNULL(apr.`effectiveTo`, "9999-12-31") > now() left join `fnd_basic_data` bd on l.`status` = bd.`basicDataId` and bd.`dataTypeCode` = 'processStatus' left join `fnd_basic_data` bd2 on l.`trackStatus` = bd2.`basicDataId` and bd2.`dataTypeCode` = 'trackStatus'
ph.projectId = #{model.projectId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
ph.projectName like CONCAT("%", #{model.projectName}, "%") AND
ph.projectType = #{model.projectType} AND
ia.id = #{model.assetId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
ia.assetName like #{model.assetName, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
ph.effectiveFrom <= #{model.effectiveFrom, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND apr.effectiveFrom <= #{model.effectiveFrom, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
(ph.effectiveTo is null or ph.effectiveTo >= #{model.effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) AND (apr.effectiveTo is null or apr.effectiveTo >= #{model.effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) AND
l.id = #{model.id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
l.leakCode = #{model.leakCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.leakName = #{model.leakName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.leakType = #{model.leakType, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.leakLevel = #{model.leakLevel, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.leakDesc = #{model.leakDesc, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.leakSourceInfo = #{model.leakSourceInfo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.remark = #{model.remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.status = #{model.status, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
l.trackStatus = #{model.trackStatus, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
l.trackedTime = #{model.trackedTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
l.disabled = #{model.disabled, jdbcType=BIT} AND
l.assetIds = #{model.assetIds, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.customInfo = #{model.customInfo, jdbcType=JSON} AND
( l.leakCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.leakName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.leakType like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.leakLevel like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.leakDesc like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.leakSourceInfo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetNum like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetCategory like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetType like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetHost like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetOpenPorts like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetDeployInfo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetUsage like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.customerName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.industryCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetAS like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetASVersion like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetASIdentify like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetASFramework like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.middlewareName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.middlewareVersion like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.developerBrand like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetOS like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetOSVersion like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetDB like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetDBVersion like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.projectName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
order by ${orderBy}
order by apr.projectId, ia.id desc
limit #{start}, #{pageSize}

select count(1) from `af_industry_asset_leak_relation` alr left join `af_industry_leak` l on alr.`leakId` = l.`id` and alr.`disabled` = false and l.`disabled` = false left join af_industry_asset as ia on ia.`id` = alr.`assetId` and alr.`disabled` = false and ia.`disabled` = false left join af_industry_asset_project_relation apr on apr.assetId = ia.id and ia.disabled = false left join `pm_project` ph on ph.`projectId` = apr.`projectId` and apr.`disabled` = false and IFNULL(apr.`effectiveTo`, "9999-12-31") > now()
ph.projectId = #{model.projectId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
ph.projectName like CONCAT("%", #{model.projectName}, "%") AND
ph.projectType = #{model.projectType} AND
ia.id = #{model.assetId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
ia.assetName like #{model.assetName, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
ph.effectiveFrom <= #{model.effectiveFrom, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND apr.effectiveFrom <= #{model.effectiveFrom, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
(ph.effectiveTo is null or ph.effectiveTo >= #{model.effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) AND (apr.effectiveTo is null or apr.effectiveTo >= #{model.effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) AND
l.id = #{model.id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
l.leakCode = #{model.leakCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.leakName = #{model.leakName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.leakType = #{model.leakType, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.leakLevel = #{model.leakLevel, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.leakDesc = #{model.leakDesc, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.leakSourceInfo = #{model.leakSourceInfo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.remark = #{model.remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.status = #{model.status, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
l.trackStatus = #{model.trackStatus, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
l.trackedTime = #{model.trackedTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
l.disabled = #{model.disabled, jdbcType=BIT} AND
l.assetIds = #{model.assetIds, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.customInfo = #{model.customInfo, jdbcType=JSON} AND
( l.leakCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.leakName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.leakType like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.leakLevel like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.leakDesc like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.leakSourceInfo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetNum like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetCategory like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetType like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetHost like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetOpenPorts like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetDeployInfo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetUsage like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.customerName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.industryCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetAS like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetASVersion like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetASIdentify like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetASFramework like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.middlewareName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.middlewareVersion like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.developerBrand like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetOS like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetOSVersion like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetDB like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ia.assetDBVersion like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.projectName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
